Challengers (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $50,119,408Details
International Box Office $46,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $96,119,408
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $231,638
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $485,748
Total $717,386
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Tashi Duncan is a former tennis prodigy turned coach and a force of nature who makes no apologies for her game on and off the court. Married to a champion on a losing streak, Tashi’s strategy for her husband’s redemption takes a surprising turn when he must face off against the washed-up Patrick—his former best friend and Tashi’s former boyfriend. As their pasts and presents collide, and tensions run high, Tashi must ask herself, what will it cost to win?

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,011,061 (30.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.34 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$55,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,477 opening theaters/3,477 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $52,999,831

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 26th, 2024 (Wide) by Amazon MGM Studios
April 26th, 2024 (IMAX) by Amazon MGM Studios
International Releases: April 18th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
April 18th, 2024 (Wide) (New Zealand)
April 24th, 2024 (Wide), released as Challengers (챌린저스) (South Korea)
April 24th, 2024 (Wide) (Netherlands)
April 24th, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
Video Release: May 17th, 2024 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: R for language throughout, some sexual content and graphic nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2779 (cert #54128), 4/19/2023)
Running Time: 131 minutes
Plot point: Romance, Tennis, Underdog
Release detail: Disrupted by 2023 WGA & SAG Strikes
Subgenre: Sports Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Pascal Pictures, Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Amazon Studios, Why Are You Acting?, Frenesy Film
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Tashi Duncan is a former tennis prodigy turned coach and a force of nature who makes no apologies for her game on and off the court. Married to a champion on a losing streak, Tashi’s strategy for her husband’s redemption takes a surprising turn when he must face off against the washed-up Patrick—his former best friend and Tashi’s former boyfriend. As their pasts and presents collide, and tensions run high, Tashi must ask herself, what will it cost to win?
